title: Make shadcn polish comparison-driven
sources: human report, 2026-07-20: repeated shadcn polish remains ugly

mainline.contradiction: The visual-design refine path can diagnose component drift but responds by inventing and uniformly propagating style values, so repeated shadcn polish converges on a coherent but ugly caricature instead of a selected visual relation.
acceptance: A shadcn polish activation distinguishes system normalization, direction under-expression, direction mismatch, and local defect before selecting an owner.
Uncertain aesthetic treatment uses a bounded rendered variant comparison rather than serial production tweaks or invented values.
The method treats a related component ecology as the propagation unit while preserving intentional role differences.
A matched DeepSeek treatment probe replaces uniform-value prescription with comparison-driven planning, and a local-defect boundary probe avoids unnecessary system ceremony.
